author: fix-stealth-bugs
content: Completed: Fixed 5 bugs in stealth JS instrumentation (instrument.ts, stealth.ts, error.ts). Extension builds cleanly (TypeScript + webpack). Tests blocked by port 8000 contention from concurrent agents — environmental issue, not code bugs. Commit abfeb80 on feature/fix-critical-bugs-in-pr-1148-stealth-js-instrumentation-fb27.
